  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {"R1.3": "Flags some claims that lack clear evidence support (e.g., 'AdaptivePINN exposes no residual-weight hyperparameter to the user').", "R1.6": "The writing is generally clear and concise, with improved flow compared to the original.", "R1.7": "No citations are added or corrected.", "RX.1": "Does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims.", "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but drifts into discussing a 4x range of window sizes which is not part of the active set.", "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content introduced.", "RX.5": "No source annotations are provided for changes made."},

rationale.R1.3: Flags some claims that lack clear evidence support (e.g., 'AdaptivePINN exposes no residual-weight hyperparameter to the user').
rationale.R1.6: The writing is generally clear and concise, with improved flow compared to the original.
rationale.R1.7: No citations are added or corrected.
rationale.RX.1: Does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but drifts into discussing a 4x range of window sizes which is not part of the active set.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: No source annotations are provided for changes made.
